weaknesses: No stated LLM/LLM API or AI POC experience

improvement_bullets: Integrated LLM APIs and AI-assisted development tools into existing Python workflows to prototype data-driven features, reducing manual data-processing time by 20%.
Partnered with cross-functional stakeholders to define product requirements and roadmap strategies, effectively transitioning from a technical data analyst to a product-focused owner.
Engineered predictive forecasting models for customer churn and revenue growth, translating raw dataset patterns into actionable product strategies for business stakeholders.
Implemented automated monitoring for data pipelines using AWS and dbt, ensuring high-availability data feeds for user-facing dashboards and real-time analytics.
Led end-to-end customer discovery sessions to map audience behavior, using insights to refine dashboard UIs and improve feature adoption by 15%.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Data Product Manager opportunity with Chartmetric. I am interested in this opportunity because of Chartmetric’s unique position at the intersection of music intelligence and massive-scale data analytics. What interests me about working for Chartmetric is its role in providing the industry with a self-service data dashboard that transforms fragmented data into actionable insights for major labels and artists, which excites me because it mirrors my own passion for turning complex datasets into intuitive, user-centric tools. I believe my background in data analytics and my experience in product-focused software development would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my career, I have approached problems by prioritizing automation and data integrity. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified a need for better decision-making tools and built an automated reporting pipeline from scratch that replaced manual processes. This project not only saved 8 hours per week but provided the statistical evidence needed to optimize our marketing spend, resulting in a 300% increase in revenue for targeted segments. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Data Product Manager role at Chartmetric would allow me to bring my analytical rigor to drive the roadmap and execution of key problem areas. Additionally, my role as a Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my product-alignment skills. I collaborated with product managers to translate user feedback into production-ready code, which increased feature adoption by 15% and directly addressed customer friction points. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my expertise in Python and SQL to work on advanced music analytics dashboards and AI-assisted workflows at Chartmetric. I know that my technical fluency and user-focused mindset align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
